description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish and a modern, rectangular design. The front features five vertical panels, four of which are likely doors, each equipped with a long, slim handle, and one central section that appears to be a two-part compartment, possibly a combination of a door and a drawer. The sides and top are flat and unadorned, showcasing a consistent wood grain texture throughout. The cabinet is solid and robust, suitable for storage in urban environments such as offices, garages, or communal spaces. The handles are all vertically oriented, suggesting easy access to the interior compartments. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the back is plain, indicating it is designed to be placed against a wall.
description: A large, dark brown wooden cabinet with five vertical panels and long handles, featuring a modern, minimalist design. The cabinet is solid, with a flat top and sides, and no visible glass or contents.
description_view_0: Front view showing five vertical panels with long handles, likely doors and a central compartment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a flat, unadorned wooden surface with visible wood grain.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, featureless wooden back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a flat wooden surface and no handles.
